description: insert (line 82), remove (line 89), get (line 150), and put (line 166) in secretx-mem/src/lib.rs all call .expect('MemStore lock poisoned') which panics if another thread panicked while holding the RwLock. None of these public methods document this with a ## Panics section. Per Rust API Guidelines (C-FAILURE), public functions that can panic should document the conditions.
title: Missing Panics doc on lock-poisoning expects
